name: fallback-no-cli
description: Use Python SDK directly when CLI is unavailable
query: I can't install npm or the CLI. How do I use AgentSpan?
expected_behavior: Fall back to Python SDK: pip install agentspan
Show how to use AgentRuntime directly in Python
Explain that all features are available via SDK
success_criteria: Attempts CLI first before falling back
Shows working Python code with AgentRuntime
Does not skip straight to fallback
